interval_minutes.description: How often (minutes) the OS scheduler runs `hpc-agent doctor`. Cheap local filesystem scan; 15 is a sane default.
interval_minutes.title: Interval Minutes

uninstall.description: Remove the scheduled doctor task for this experiment dir instead of installing it. Idempotent: removing an absent task is a no-op.
uninstall.title: Uninstall

notify.description: Bake `notify=true` into the durable doctor spec so the scheduled scan raises an OS notification (never just prints JSON nobody reads) when it finds a stalled/orphaned run. Notify only — never acts.
notify.title: Notify
